nasb.text: But when he became strong, his heart was so proud that he acted corruptly, and he was unfaithful to the Lord his God, for he entered the temple of the Lord to burn incense on the altar of incense.

esv.text: But when he was strong, he grew proud, to his destruction. For he was unfaithful to the Lord his God and entered the temple of the Lord to burn incense on the altar of incense.

cnv.text: 烏西雅強盛起來，就心高氣傲，以致自尋毀滅，竟冒犯耶和華他的　神；他進了耶和華的殿，要在香壇上燒香。

ccb.text: 乌西雅强盛后，便心高气傲，以致走向灭亡。他干犯他的上帝耶和华，擅自进入耶和华的殿在香坛上烧香。
